ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position the player plays (e.g., SG, C, PF) */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "arena" TEXT /* Home arena of the team */,
  "conference" TEXT /* Conference the team belongs to */,
  "division" TEXT /* Division the team belongs to */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "seasons" (
  "season_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each season */,
  "season_year" TEXT /* Year of the season (e.g., 1997-98) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the season */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the season */,
  "regular_season_start" TEXT /* Start date of the regular season */,
  "regular_season_end" TEXT /* End date of the regular season */,
  "playoffs_start" TEXT /* Start date of the playoffs */,
  "playoffs_end" TEXT /* End date of the playoffs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "statistics" (
  "stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each statistic record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistics belong to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season for which the statistics are recorded */,
  "games_played" INTEGER /* Number of games played by the player during the season */,
  "games_started" INTEGER /* Number of games started by the player during the season */,
  "minutes_per_game" REAL /* Average minutes played per game by the player */,
  "points" REAL /* Total points scored by the player */,
  "assists" REAL /* Total assists made by the player */,
  "rebounds" REAL /* Total rebounds made by the player */,
  "steals" REAL /* Total steals made by the player */,
  "blocks" REAL /* Total blocks made by the player */,
  "turnovers" REAL /* Total turnovers committed by the player */,
  "field_goal_pct" REAL /* Field goal percentage */,
  "three_point_pct" REAL /* Three-point shooting percentage */,
  "free_throw_pct" REAL /* Free throw percentage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_statistics_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "contracts" (
  "contract_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each contract record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the contract belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season for which the contract is active */,
  "salary" REAL /* Annual salary of the player */,
  "salary_cap" REAL /* Total salary cap of the team */,
  "percentage_of_cap" REAL /* Percentage of the salary cap that the player's salary represents */,
  "contract_length" INTEGER /* Length of the contract in years */,
  "contract_type" TEXT /* Type of contract (e.g., rookie, veteran, max) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("contract_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_contracts_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "salary_caps" (
  "salary_cap_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each salary cap record */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team associated with the salary cap */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season the salary cap is applicable to */,
  "total_salary_cap" REAL /* Total salary cap for the team in that season */,
  "luxury_tax_threshold" REAL /* Luxury tax threshold for the team in that season */,
  "tax_aprilroachment" REAL /* Tax apron for the team in that season */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("salary_cap_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_caps_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_salary_caps_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award record */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the award belongs to */,
  "season_id" INTEGER /* ID of the season for which the award was given */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_type" TEXT /* Type of award (e.g., MVP, All-Star, All-NBA) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_awards_season_id FOREIGN KEY ("season_id") REFERENCES seasons ("season_id")
)
